'''Ghishi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Ghishi system/Legends|Ghishi system]] and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ghishi (species)|Ghishi]] species.

{{Planet-stub}}

[[File:KraidNemmeso-RR.png|thumb|left|150px|A [[Ghishi (species)|Ghishi]].]]
